mdRecord.dcterms:title: Criminal Warrants, Justice of the Peace: Commonwealth vs James A. Lancaster
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Commonwealth vs James A. Lancaster Offense: Assault Victim: F.A. Hall Complainant: M.C. Dickerson Recorded in Floyd County Courthouse 11.22.1887 Guilty, Court cost: $2.50, Fine:$5.80
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
Warrants (Law)
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
